important_implicit_themes.label: fixed-income vigilance organizes the month
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Deeva's profile repeatedly ties emotional steadiness to ledger discipline, predictable costs, and avoiding financial surprises.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Show receipts, tax talk, coupon choices, and travel math embedded in ordinary planning instead of direct labels about scarcity.

important_implicit_themes.label: caregiving remains practical and quiet
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Her corrected profile centers Harold's health limits and Deeva's refusal to dramatize family help.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Use rides, pill timing, chair choices, and small household adjustments rather than explicit caregiving language.

important_implicit_themes.label: routine and community are her stability system
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Walking club, church, bridge, and the senior center are repeated anchors across the canon.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Reveal through recurring obligations, hosting notes, volunteer preparation, and familiar weekly cadence.

important_implicit_themes.label: health is managed by systems not speeches
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: Deeva's profile supports pill organizers, low-salt cooking, walking adjustments, and appointment follow-through.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Let meal substitutions, medication timing, and slower plans carry the information.

important_implicit_themes.label: quilting and gardening carry legacy forward
important_implicit_themes.why_selected: The verified profile makes quilts, gifts, bird notes, and garden routines central to how Deeva makes meaning.
important_implicit_themes.implicit_reveal_strategy: Use project planning, fabric talk, family gifting, and seasonal yard tasks instead of direct statements about identity.

dynamic_events.label: spring-luncheon budget week takes over the senior-center files
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Deeva's verified profile supports ongoing senior-center finance volunteering and meticulous event bookkeeping.

dynamic_events.label: Harold's follow-up visit resets the household pace for a week
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Harold's heart-related history and mobility limits are directly established in the corrected profile and social circle.

dynamic_events.label: church fish fry and quilt-raffle week turns domestic craft into public work
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Church involvement, food prep, and quilting-as-gift or community contribution are established in the corrected profile.

dynamic_events.label: a saltier week and tired ankles push Deeva back toward her stricter routine
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Low-salt cooking, pill routine, and self-monitoring are explicit patterns in Deeva's corrected health profile.

dynamic_events.label: Paducah quilt museum planning becomes a serious ledger question
dynamic_events.why_plausible: The corrected profile explicitly names the National Quilt Museum trip as a dream Patricia would help drive.

dynamic_events.label: raised-bed repair day turns into a family work-and-memory afternoon
dynamic_events.why_plausible: Garden care, Robert's repair role, and Patricia's practical support are all grounded in the verified files.

filler_strategy.integration_strategy: Filler sessions are spread across the full month, recycled through relationship-specific topics, and added in looped passes alongside extra calendar density until the measured benchmark text clears the threshold.

events.notes: Robert handles the sturdier repairs while Patricia keeps the flow from becoming too much standing and guessing. Dorothy will bring the sensible commentary and probably muffins.

events.title: Raised Bed Repair + Seed Start Day
events.notes: The point is not just seedlings. It is keeping a livable, tended world in motion. A garden day that is also family maintenance, seasonal hope, and practical yard work all at once.
